# Vulcan Zaz, CNN Fantasies & Art Market Chills

**Source:** inputs/saved_html/Vulcan Zaz, CNN Fantasies & Art Market Chills_Mon,_13_May_2024_19-01-11_+0000_18f7354bff93f09d.html

Netflix’s NFL Gambit, 10th-Ave Frieze Out, The Great Re-Bundling
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | |  | | --- | | [View email in browser](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dQYzFPVWJjbFJTRGJ2N1U5V3JjUT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dQYzFPVWJjbFJTRGJ2N1U5V3JjUT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | |  | | --- | | **Netflix’s NFL Gambit, 10th-Ave Frieze Out, The Great Re-Bundling** | | Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon dispatch of Puck’s best new reporting.     First up today, **Dylan Byers** gut-checks the enduring media fantasy that **Jeff Zucker** might return from the wilderness to buy CNN. Is it merely a narrative-friendly fever dream, or is there a twinkle of logic to the notion?     Plus, below the fold: **William D. Cohan** reveals **David Zaslav** ’s potential spoils from the Paramount mess. **Marion Maneker** captures the pall over New York’s bustling May art market. On *The Town* , **Matt Belloni** and **Lucas Shaw** divine the fate of the forthcoming Disney+-Hulu-Max rollup. And on *The Powers That Be* , **Jon Kelly** joins **Peter Hamby** to discuss the Netflix-NFL Christmas Day experiment before turning to the latest CNN murmurs. | |  | | [The Zucker Savior Myth](https://email.puck.) | | DYLAN BYERS | | The endurance of the “Will Jeff buy CNN?” fantasy, which was stoked again this week, highlights the uncertain state of the media industry, and a few enduring truths about Zucker, too. He may have reinvented himself as an investor, but he remains an operator at heart. And, if given the opportunity, he’d probably be back in the control room in a heartbeat. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Vulcan Zaz](https://email.puck.) | | WILLIAM D. COHAN | | Could the Paramount mess actually provide an unexpected benefit to David Zaslav and Warner Bros. Discovery? | |  | | [Tenth-Avenue Frieze Out](https://email.puck.) | | MARION MANEKER | | News and notes on all the shows around New York, what everyone is saying, and not saying, too. | |  | | [Disney+ and Max Have Bundled, Who’s Next?](https://email.puck.) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | Matt is joined by Bloomberg’s Lucas Shaw to discuss the new bundle starting this summer that will combine Disney+, Hulu, and Max. They pick winners and losers of the deal, and wonder who might be the next to join in on the Great Re-Bundling. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Media Monday: An NFL-Netflix Marriage & Zucker-CNN Fever Dreams](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dQYzFPVWJjbFJTRGJ2N1U5V3JjUT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL21lZGlhLW1vbmRheS1hbi1uZmwtbmV0ZmxpeC1tYXJyaWFnZS16dWNrZXItY25uLWZldmVyLWRyZWFtcy8_) | | PETER HAMBY & JON KELLY | | Jon Kelly joins Peter to discuss Netflix’s bid to produce two NFL Christmas Day games—the price tag, logistics, and deal quirks. And then the duo chew over the latest CNN murmurs. | | |  | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dQYzFPVWJjbFJTRGJ2N1U5V3JjUT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
